title: Almost a quarter of 'Latgale' election candidates live elsewhere
summary_full: In the 15th Saeima elections, which are due to take place on October 3rd, there are fewer candidates standing in the eastern Latgale region than four years ago, and around one in four of those that are standing don't even live in the region.
